meta.note: Costs are approximate mid-2026 estimates in USD (accom per night; dailyLiving = food+local transport+activities for 2, excl. accommodation; rentMonthly = furnished 1-BR). Weather = climate normals: avg daily high/low C and monthly rainfall mm. Verify visas and live advisories before booking.

Thailand.visa: Visa-free 30 days (cut from 60 in 2026). Free TDAC arrival card <=72h at tdac.immigration.go.th. Extend +30d (~$55). Longer: DTV visa.
Thailand.bestTime: Nov-Feb (cool, dry). Avoid Mar-Apr heat; Chiang Mai haze Feb-Apr; monsoon Jun-Oct.
Thailand.safety: Very safe (L1). Tuk-tuk gem/tailor scams, fake closed-attraction touts. Avoid deep south + Cambodia border. Tourist Police 1155.

Vietnam.visa: Visa-free 45 days (Hungary, to Aug 2028). Or e-visa 90d multi ~$25-50 at evisa.gov.vn.
Vietnam.bestTime: Oct-Apr overall. Central (Da Nang/Hoi An) avoid Sep-Nov (typhoon/flood). North best Mar-Apr & Oct-Nov.
Vietnam.safety: Very safe (L1). Use Grab app; watch taxi-meter & Ha Long cruise scams.

Indonesia.visa: VOA/e-VOA ~$35, 30d, extend +30. Long-term: E33G remote-worker visa (1yr). Pay Bali tourist levy ~$10pp at lovebali.baliprov.go.id.
Indonesia.bestTime: Dry Apr-Oct (best May/Jun/Sep/Oct). Wet Nov-Mar (cheaper, greener).
Indonesia.safety: Stable. #1 risk = scooter accidents - ride only with licence + IDP. Scooter-damage & money-changer scams.

Malaysia.visa: Visa-free 90 days. Free MDAC >=3 days before arrival at imigresen-online.imi.gov.my. Long-term: DE Rantau nomad pass.
Malaysia.bestTime: KL/Penang driest Dec-Apr. Haze season Aug-Oct (Sumatra fires).
Malaysia.safety: Among SE Asia's safest. Bag-snatch/phone theft; use Grab.

Cambodia.visa: e-Visa ~$36 (evisa.gov.kh) or VOA ~$30, 30d, extend +30. USD used everywhere.
Cambodia.bestTime: Nov-Feb best (Angkor sunrise, peak crowds). Mar-Apr very hot. Flood risk Sep-Oct.
Cambodia.safety: Generally safe. Buy Angkor pass ONLY at angkorenterprise.gov.kh. Pub St drink-spiking; bag-snatch.

Laos.visa: 30-day visa exemption currently in effect for Hungary/EU (temporary, ~to 2028 - VERIFY live). Else e-visa ~$50 or VOA ~$30-40, 30d. Exemption non-extendable (border hop).
Laos.bestTime: Nov-Feb (cool, dry). AVOID Mar-Apr burning/haze season (esp. Luang Prabang). May-Oct monsoon.
Laos.safety: Generally safe, low violent crime. Petty theft, road accidents; tuk-tuk overcharging (no ride-hail, negotiate).

Singapore.visa: Visa-free 90 days. Free SG Arrival Card <=72h at ica.gov.sg.
Singapore.bestTime: Feb-Apr driest. Hot/humid year-round. Haze risk Jun-Oct.
Singapore.safety: Among world's safest BUT strict: drugs=death penalty, vapes banned (even transit), fines for gum/jaywalk/litter.

Japan.visa: Visa-free 90 days. Pre-register Visit Japan Web.
Japan.bestTime: Apr-May & Oct-Nov best. Cherry blossom late Mar-early Apr; avoid Golden Week; rainy Jun-mid-Jul; typhoons Aug-Sep.
Japan.safety: Very safe. Rare nightlife bar scams in Kabukicho/Roppongi - never follow touts.

South Korea.visa: Visa-free 90 days. No K-ETA for Hungary (to end-2026). Free e-Arrival Card.
South Korea.bestTime: Apr-May & mid-Oct-early Nov. Monsoon mid-Jun-Jul; typhoons Aug-Sep; spring yellow dust.
South Korea.safety: Very safe. Use Kakao T for taxis; beware K-pop ticket fraud.

Taiwan.bestTime: Oct-Nov & April. Plum rain May-Jun; typhoons Jul-Sep; hot humid summers.
Taiwan.safety: Very safe. No meat imports (ASF fines). Traffic + quakes/typhoons are the main risks.

Hong Kong.bestTime: Oct-early Dec (cool, dry). Typhoons May-Nov (T8 shuts the city); humid summers.
Hong Kong.safety: Among safest cities. Kowloon electronics/jewelry bait-and-switch; taxi steering.

China.visa: CHANGES OFTEN - verify with Embassy. Unilateral visa-free up to 30 days for Hungary (to Dec 31 2026), free. Else 240h transit. Excludes Tibet/Xinjiang.
China.bestTime: Apr-May & Sep-Oct (avoid Oct 1-7). Shanghai plum rains mid-Jun-Jul; Chengdu often grey.
China.safety: Safe for crime; risk is scams (infamous tea-house scam - never follow strangers). Google/WhatsApp/Booking blocked - use foreign eSIM + Alipay/WeChat/Trip.com/Didi.

India.visa: e-Tourist Visa online only (no VOA). 30d $10-25 / 1yr multi $40 (+3% fee), max 180d/yr. indianvisaonline.gov.in.
India.bestTime: Oct-Mar. Avoid Apr-Jun heat & Jul-Sep monsoon. Delhi smog late Oct-Jan (bring N95).
India.safety: Moderate. Meter/closed-hotel/gem scams. Women: dress modestly, Uber/Ola at night.

Nepal.visa: Visa on arrival: 15d $30 / 30d $50 / 90d $125 (cash). Max 150d/yr. Solo trekking banned - guide + TIMS required.
Nepal.safety: Very safe. Trek-agency & taxi overcharging - agree fares up front.

Sri Lanka.visa: ETA required online ~$50, 30d double-entry (verify free-ETA list at eta.gov.lk - Hungary not confirmed). Extend to 90-180d.
Sri Lanka.bestTime: Dec-Mar (south/west + hills). Two monsoons - opposite coast is always dry.
Sri Lanka.safety: Safe, friendly. Tuk-tuk & gem scams; drink-spiking reported. Use PickMe app.

Bangladesh.visa: Visa required. VOA ~$51pp cash (USD/EUR), 30d, extend +30, at officer discretion - safer to pre-arrange. e-visa announced but unreliable (verify visa.gov.bd).
Bangladesh.bestTime: Nov-Feb (cool, dry). Apr-May very hot; Jun-Oct monsoon/flooding. Cox's Bazar beach Nov-early Mar.
Bangladesh.safety: US advisory Level 3 (Reconsider Travel) - crime, unrest; avoid demos. DO NOT travel Chittagong Hill Tracts. Dress conservatively; use Pathao/Uber. Check travel.state.gov.
